name: Bilberry Extract
summary: Bilberry Extract is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on Stress Response. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around Oxidative Stress Modulation; Stress Response Modulation, not treatment claims.

safetyNotes: GI upset and bleeding-risk caution possible with anticoagulants.
